zh.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Lara是D. Rodrigo Rodriguez de Lara Trapinedo和Elvira Garcia de Azagra的女兒，出生。她和Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Lara是D. Rodrigo Rodriguez de Lara Trapinedo和Elvira Garcia de Azagra的女儿，出生。她和Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Rodriguez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Luis, Carlos, Jesus, Francisco, Jorge, Pedro, Raul, Miguel, Roberto, Ramon, Rafael.  Portuguese Wenceslao, Ligia, Catarina, Paulo, Joaquim, Omero, Joao, Wenseslao, Adauto, Albeiro, Godofredo.

Spanish (Rodríguez) and Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name Rodrigo . Rodriguez (including in the sense 2 below) is the ninth most frequent surname in the US. Compare De Rodriguez and Rodriquez .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Rodiguez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Luis, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Pedro, Raul, Adriana, Alvaro, Ana Luz, Angel, Armando, Arnulfo.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodriquez
meanings: Spanish (Rodríquez): variant of Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ). This surname is very rare in Spain.

variants.name: Rodriges
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodreguez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodrigo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Elena, Rafael, Alfonso, Alicia, Angel, Araceli, Benardo, Carlos, Carlota, Cristina, Emilio.  Indian Devi, Dileep, Dilip, Gamini, Mahendra, Manoj, Sunil, Tilak.

Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Rodrigo, from ancient Germanic Hrōdrīc, a compound of hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + rīc ‘power, kingdom’. Rodrigo is one of the most important Spanish personal names of ancient Germanic origin. It was borne by the last of the Visigoth kings and by a Christian saint, Saint Roderick, one of the 9th-century martyrs of Córdoba. This surname is also found in and around some of the former Portuguese territories of western India.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Francisco, Carlos, Jorge, Luis, Pedro, Jesus, Roberto, Rafael, Mario.
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Lara de los Infantes in Burgos province. Compare   De Lara  .

variants.name: De Lara
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Jose, Luis, Mauricio, Pedro, Alfonso, Ana, Jaime, Javier, Jorge, Merlinda.
Spanish: variant, with the preposition de ‘from’, of Lara .

nameMeanings.name: Sancha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: spelling of Sasha, Russian pet form of Alexander and Alexandra .

en.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Lara was born as the daughter of D. Rodrigo Rodriguez de Lara Trapinedo and Elvira Garcia de Azagra. She had at least 1 daughter with Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis.

fr.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Lara est née, fille de D. Rodrigo Rodriguez de Lara Trapinedo et Elvira Garcia de Azagra. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Gonzalo Roiz Giron Matordomus domini regis.
